name: Store Temp Loc
Prep Influx Loc
Get Loc from Cache
MPPT custom CSS compact
format:
<style>

:root {

--bg:#080b12;

--panel:#10141d;

--panel2:#151a24;

--border:#252d3a;

--text:#d6d9e0;

--muted:#7f899b;

--blue:#64748b;

}


.nrdb-ui-page {
 background:#020617!important;
}


.nrdb-ui-group {

 background:#0f172a!important;

 border:
 1px solid #1e293b!important;

 border-radius:16px!important;

 box-shadow:
 0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.25)!important;

 padding:14px!important;

}


/* group titles */

.nrdb-ui-group-title {

 color:#e5e7eb!important;

 font-weight:800!important;

 letter-spacing:.08em;

 font-size:12px!important;

}


/* =====================
 DEVICE HEADER
===================== */


#ui-dev-info > div {

 background:#111827!important;

 border:1px solid #334155!important;

 border-radius:16px!important;

 padding:20px!important;

 min-height:unset!important;

}


.device-summary {

display:grid!important;

grid-template-columns:
1fr auto;

gap:28px;

align-items:center;

padding-left:18px;
padding-right:18px;

}


.device-title-row {

 display:flex!important;

 align-items:center;

 gap:14px;

}


.device-dot {

 width:14px;
 height:14px;

 border-radius:50%;

}


.device-name {

 color:#f8fafc!important;

 font-size:24px!important;

 font-weight:800!important;

}


.device-status {

 margin-top:5px;

 font-size:11px;

 font-weight:900;

}


.device-stats {

 display:flex!important;

 gap:10px!important;

}


.device-stats div {

 background:#0b1220!important;

 border:
 1px solid #334155;

 border-radius:12px;

 padding:12px 15px;

 min-width:90px;

}


.device-stats span {

 color:#64748b!important;

 font-size:10px;

 font-weight:700;

}


.device-stats strong {

 color:#f1f5f9!important;

 font-size:15px;

}


/* =====================
 INPUTS
===================== */


.v-field {

 background:#020617!important;

 border:
 1px solid #334155!important;

 border-radius:12px!important;

}


.v-field__input,
input {

 color:#f8fafc!important;

}


label {

 color:#94a3b8!important;

}


/* =====================
 BUTTONS
===================== */


.mppt-btn-primary button {

 background:#2563eb!important;

 border-radius:12px!important;

 height:42px!important;

 font-weight:800!important;

}


.mppt-btn-secondary button {

 background:#334155!important;

 border-radius:12px!important;

}

/* =====================
COMMAND LOG
===================== */


#ui-cmd-log,
#ui-cmd-log > div,
#ui-cmd-log .v-card,
#ui-cmd-log .v-card-text {

width:100%!important;
height:100%!important;
max-width:none!important;
box-sizing:border-box!important;

}


.nrdb-ui-text {

width:100%!important;

}


.nrdb-ui-text .v-card {

background:transparent!important;
box-shadow:none!important;

}



.cmdlog-container {

width:100%!important;
height:100%!important;

min-height:260px;

background:#0b1220!important;

border:
1px solid #1e293b!important;

border-radius:14px;

padding:18px;

color:#cbd5e1;

font-family:monospace;

overflow:auto;

box-sizing:border-box;

}


/* log rows */

.cmdlog-container > div {

padding:8px 4px!important;

border-bottom:
1px solid #1e293b!important;

}


/* timestamps */

.cmdlog-container span {

color:#64748b;

}


/* empty state */

.cmdlog-empty {

color:#475569!important;

font-style:italic;

}


/* dropdown */

.v-overlay-container .v-list {

 background:#111827!important;

}


.v-list-item {

 color:#e5e7eb!important;

}


</style>
